expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: developer smoke checklist is derived from P1 and analog-gate scenarios
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly addresses the focus: "the workflow must ensure a developer smoke checklist is derived from P1 and `[ANALOG-GATE]` scenarios" and cites enforcement logic: "extractDeveloperSmokeRows() includes a scenario row only if it is `<P1>` or contains `[ANALOG-GATE]`." It also references README.md stating the artifact is "derived from P1 and `[ANALOG-GATE]` scenarios during Phase 7."

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase7
expectations.evidence: result.md anchors the behavior in phase7: "Primary phase under test: phase7" and "Authoritative phase7 behavior... scripts/phase7.sh finalizes the plan and generates a summary using scripts/lib/finalPlanSummary.mjs" and concludes "PASS (phase alignment evidence)... generation ... squarely in Phase 7." execution_notes.md similarly cites phase7 responsibilities in the skill snapshot and notes the phase7 generation mechanism is present.
